description: Create a digital logic circuit diagram for a 4-bit Ripple Carry Adder in draw.io based on the specification in '~/Desktop/adder_specification.txt'. The diagram must include two pages: a block-level page named '4-Bit Ripple Carry Adder' and a gate-level schematic page named 'Full Adder Gate Level'. The block-level page should feature four Full Adder blocks (FA0-FA3) connected in a ripple carry chain with the first carry input grounded and all inputs (A0-A3, B0-B3) and outputs (S0-S3, Cout) labeled. The gate-level page should implement a single Full Adder using XOR, AND, and OR gates for the equations Sum = A XOR B XOR Cin and Cout = (A AND B) OR (Cin AND (A XOR B)), including labels and Boolean equation annotations. Save the diagram as '~/Desktop/ripple_carry_adder.drawio' and export the block-level page as '~/Desktop/ripple_carry_adder.png'.
